summary: Iteration 52 - Admin Settings Sidebar Layout and Global Trading Features Testing Complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Sidebar layout with all tabs (SEO & Meta, Branding, UI Settings, API Keys, Links, Emails, Maintenance) renders correctly. Global Trading tab is visible ONLY to Master Admins with Trading Products management (5 products: MOIL10, XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY) and Global Holidays management (5 holidays configured). OnboardingWizard correctly fetches products and holidays from backend.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSettingsPage.jsx: Lines 560-650 define sidebar layout with all tabs
AdminSettingsPage.jsx: Lines 631-647 show Global Trading tab ONLY when isMasterAdmin is true
AdminSettingsPage.jsx: Lines 1903-2099 render Global Trading section with Trading Products and Global Holidays
OnboardingWizard.jsx: Lines 126-143 load global settings (holidays and products) from backend on open
OnboardingWizard.jsx: Lines 102-104 use tradingProducts from backend, fallback to defaultProducts
api.js: Lines 125-127 define tradeAPI.getGlobalHolidays and tradeAPI.getTradingProducts for user access
api.js: Lines 146-153 define adminAPI endpoints for managing products and holidays
seed_data_creation: 5 trading products (MOIL10, XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY) and 5 global holidays exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Settings page uses sidebar layout (not tabs). Global Trading section is Master Admin only. Trading Products and Global Holidays are managed via admin endpoints and consumed by OnboardingWizard via trade endpoints.

feature_1_sidebar_layout.details: Sidebar with tabs: SEO & Meta, Branding, UI Settings, API Keys, Links, Emails, Maintenance, Global Trading (Master Admin only)

feature_2_global_trading_tab_visibility.details: Global Trading tab visible ONLY when isMasterAdmin is true, with Crown icon and 'MASTER ADMIN' label

feature_3_trading_products_management.details: Add/remove/toggle products. 5 products configured: MOIL10, XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY

feature_4_global_holidays_management.details: Calendar picker with tree icons for holidays, scheduled holidays list with delete buttons. 5 holidays configured.

feature_5_onboarding_wizard_products_int.details: OnboardingWizard fetches products from tradeAPI.getTradingProducts() and uses them in Step 5 dropdown

feature_6_onboarding_wizard_holidays_int.details: OnboardingWizard fetches global holidays from tradeAPI.getGlobalHolidays() and excludes them from trading days

api_tests.GET /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Returns list of global holidays for admins
api_tests.GET /api/trade/global-holidays: PASS - Returns list of global holidays for users
api_tests.POST /api/admin/global-holidays: PASS - Adds global holiday (Master Admin only)
api_tests.GET /api/admin/trading-products: PASS - Returns list of trading products for admins
api_tests.GET /api/trade/trading-products: PASS - Returns list of trading products for users
api_tests.POST /api/admin/trading-products: PASS - Adds trading product (Master Admin only)

admin_settings_sidebar.global_trading_tab: Present with TreePine icon (emerald highlight) - Master Admin only

global_trading_section.trading_products_card: Present with TrendingUp icon, input field, Add button, product list with toggle/delete
global_trading_section.global_holidays_card: Present with TreePine icon, calendar picker, scheduled holidays list with delete buttons
global_trading_section.holidays_list: Wed Dec 24 2025, Thu Dec 25 2025, Fri Dec 26 2025, Thu Jan 1 2026, Sun Jan 17 2027

onboarding_wizard.step1: Welcome to CrossCurrent! - New Trader / Experienced Trader options
onboarding_wizard.step5: Enter Trade Profits - Product dropdown (MOIL10 default), Direction dropdown (BUY/SELL)
